assertions: When `.zoto/eval-system/config.yml` is absent at the repository root, the assistant output is exactly: Eval System is not initialised. Run `/z-eval-init` first to create `.zoto/eval-system/config.yml`.
No `.zoto/eval-system/config.yml` file is created by this invocation.
cases.expected_output: The run stops immediately with initialise guidance and leaves the workspace without a new config file.

follow_ups: Enable discovery for skill, command, agent, hook, cli, and lib.
Keep all five update.criticalChangeRules toggles enabled.
assertions: Before the Task starts, command-owned askQuestion prompts appear in documented order covering overwrite vs cancel vs show-only paths, evalsDir, skillsRoots selections, discoveryTargets selections, static.framework, llm.strategy, llm.runtime, llm.model.id, judgeModel, manualChecklists.enabled, additionalAutomation picks, and the five update.criticalChangeRules booleans — including the conditional llm.codeFramework questionnaire whenever llm.strategy is code rather than declarative — and omit preserveUserAuthoredCases and writeMetaMarker entirely or keep both logically true-only in the outbound payload.
The hand-off bundles `readManifestSnapshot()` output describing whether values came from `manifest.yml` discovery blocks, inferred filesystem fingerprints, or a missing-manifest stub.
zoto-eval-configurer finishes without emitting askQuestion; operator prompts after the Task are limited to cleanup confirmation owned by the host command path.
cases.expected_output: The command completes the full askQuestion ladder, launches zoto-eval-configurer once with the collected answers plus an oldSnapshot from manifest-snapshot, and writes refreshed `.zoto/eval-system/config.yml` validated against the bundled config schema without asking for preserveUserAuthoredCases or writeMetaMarker fields.

follow_ups: Limit discoveryTargets to skill, command, agent, hook.
Flip static.framework to vitest while prior snapshot used pytest for static tests.
Keep llm.strategy on code and align llm.codeFramework with vitest after the conditional prompt fires.
Turn manualChecklists.enabled off and pick bats for additionalAutomation.
assertions: Returning cleanup_plan totals with files greater than zero forces the command to summarise each cleanup group summary with listed paths kinds before posing Apply this cleanup plan with Apply, Skip cleanup, or Re-run /z-eval-configure with different choices.
Selecting Apply runs `pnpm run eval:cleanup-stale` with stdin or a tempfile mirroring the JSON plan validated against `templates/schema/cleanup-plan.schema.json`.

After the configuration write, `.zoto/eval-system/manifest.yml` eval_file entries stamped as generated expose `_meta.primitive_analysis.invalidate: true` wherever static.framework or llm.strategy drifted against oldSnapshot.
Choosing Skip cleanup records the deferral in `.zoto/eval-system/manifest.history.yml` so operators know cleanup was postponed.
cases.expected_output: A non-empty cleanup_plan lists affected assets, surfaced warnings precede Apply this cleanup plan, choosing Apply invokes pnpm eval:cleanup-stale with the negotiated plan bytes, manifest rows referencing generated eval files inherit `_meta.primitive_analysis.invalidate: true`, and manifests history notes the cleanup decision.

follow_ups: First attempt purposely forwards bundled answers omitting repaired integrity flags.
Immediately repair the outbound payload removing false preserveUserAuthoredCases or writeMetaMarker flags so both protections stay true-only.
assertions: Until preserveUserAuthoredCases and writeMetaMarker are both affirmed true-only, configurier rejects before emitting any config write operator-side text calls that out the contract breach verbatim from the markdown contract.
After the corrections, the resumed Task writes `.zoto/eval-system/config.yml` without asking the operator to loosen those safeguards.
cases.expected_output: Configurer refuses prior to modifying disk until markers stay true-only, after which `.zoto/eval-system/config.yml` is written cleanly.

follow_ups: Attempt code strategy answers but defer llm.codeFramework until the corrective turn.
assertions: When llm.strategy is code and llm.codeFramework is absent from the payload, the returned report contains structured needs_user_input referencing the missing field instead of fabricating defaults.
After the command-owned follow-up records vitest, the resumed Task writes configuration where llm.codeFramework is populated.
cases.expected_output: Configurer returns structured needs_user_input describing the missing llm.codeFramework linkage, command-owned askQuestion supplies vitest, resume completes the write.

follow_ups: Approve overwrite and standard answers until configurier rejects an unexpected cleanup_plan kind value.
assertions: Cleanup plans that violate `cleanup-plan.schema.json` produce structured needs_user_input rather than silently deleting artefacts.
The command relays follow-up answers and resumes until the sanitised cleanup_plan validates.
cases.expected_output: Command surfaces configurier rejection, relays repair guidance, resumes until validation passes.

follow_ups: Overwrite while keeping frameworks and strategies unchanged but change judgeModel from opus-4.6 to sonnet only.
assertions: cleanup_plan totals report zero removable files skip the Apply this cleanup plan askQuestion altogether for that pass.
cases.expected_output: Configurer writes config with new judgeModel and skips Apply this cleanup plan because totals.files is zero.

follow_ups: Overwrite with static.framework vitest yet deliberately pick llm.codeFramework jest despite documentation recommending alignment.
assertions: Mismatch between static.framework and llm.codeFramework surfaces cleanup_plan.warning entries readable before Apply this cleanup plan.
The mismatched grouping still lists framework-switch assets with per-file kind metadata for operator review.
cases.expected_output: Returning cleanup_plan includes warnings surfaced prior to Apply this cleanup plan and still enumerates orphaned framework artefacts.

follow_ups: Reach cleanup confirmation and pick Re-run /z-eval-configure with different choices so the flow discards the in-flight write.
assertions: Choosing Re-run /z-eval-configure with different choices abandons the pending write, restores the prior backup state described in command guidance, and restarts askQuestion from the overwrite vs cancel decision.
cases.expected_output: No partial config remains applied, and the command restarts from the existing-config decision step.

assertions: When `.zoto/eval-system/config.yml` is absent at the repository root, on-screen output is exactly: Eval System is not initialised. Run `/z-eval-init` first to create `.zoto/eval-system/config.yml`.
After `/z-eval-configure`, no new `.zoto/eval-system/config.yml` is created and zoto-eval-configurer is not spawned.
cases.expected_output: The run stops immediately with initialise guidance and leaves the workspace without a new config file.

primitive_analysis.summary: Command-owned askQuestion collects every Eval System config field in documented order, hands answers plus a manifest snapshot to zoto-eval-configurer for JSON-first LLM setup, then optionally confirms and runs pnpm eval:cleanup-stale when static.framework drift produces a non-empty cleanup plan.

follow_ups: Show current configuration only — do not overwrite.
Acknowledge the read-only summary and exit.
assertions: After `/z-eval-configure`, selecting the show-only path surfaces current evalsDir, skillsRoots, discoveryTargets, static.framework, llm.runtime, llm.model.id, judgeModel, manualChecklists.enabled, additionalAutomation, and update.criticalChangeRules values without mutating disk.
zoto-eval-configurer is not spawned and `pnpm run eval:cleanup-stale` never runs.
cases.expected_output: The operator reviews the existing config fields on screen and the command ends with `.zoto/eval-system/config.yml` unchanged.

primitive_analysis.summary: Command-owned askQuestion collects every Eval System config field in documented order, hands answers plus a manifest snapshot to zoto-eval-configurer for JSON-first LLM setup, then optionally confirms and runs pnpm eval:cleanup-stale when static.framework drift produces a non-empty cleanup plan.

assertions: After `/z-eval-configure`, choosing cancel at the existing-config askQuestion ends the flow before later field prompts run.
`.zoto/eval-system/config.yml` remains byte-for-byte unchanged and zoto-eval-configurer is not spawned.
cases.expected_output: The operator backs out at the first prompt and no configuration write occurs.

primitive_analysis.summary: Command-owned askQuestion collects every Eval System config field in documented order, hands answers plus a manifest snapshot to zoto-eval-configurer for JSON-first LLM setup, then optionally confirms and runs pnpm eval:cleanup-stale when static.framework drift produces a non-empty cleanup plan.

follow_ups: Enable discovery for skill, command, agent, hook, cli, and lib.
Run LLM evals with tsx runtime.
Keep all five update.criticalChangeRules toggles enabled.
assertions: Before spawning zoto-eval-configurer, command-owned askQuestion prompts appear in documented order for existing-config disposition, evalsDir, skillsRoots, discoveryTargets, static.framework, llm.runtime, llm.model.id, judgeModel, manualChecklists.enabled, additionalAutomation, and the five update.criticalChangeRules booleans, and the command never asks for llm.strategy, llm.codeFramework, preserveUserAuthoredCases, or writeMetaMarker.
The structured hand-off includes readManifestSnapshot output whose source is manifest, filesystem, or missing per the snapshot contract.
zoto-eval-configurer writes `.zoto/eval-system/config.yml` atomically and returns cleanup_plan without emitting askQuestion from the subagent loop.
cases.expected_output: The command completes the full askQuestion ladder, launches zoto-eval-configurer with collected answers plus oldSnapshot, and refreshes `.zoto/eval-system/config.yml` validated against templates/schema/config.schema.json.

primitive_analysis.summary: Command-owned askQuestion collects every Eval System config field in documented order, hands answers plus a manifest snapshot to zoto-eval-configurer for JSON-first LLM setup, then optionally confirms and runs pnpm eval:cleanup-stale when static.framework drift produces a non-empty cleanup plan.

follow_ups: Limit discoveryTargets to skill, command, agent, and hook.
Change static.framework from pytest to vitest.
Disable manualChecklists.enabled and add bats under additionalAutomation.
assertions: When cleanup_plan.totals.files is greater than zero, after `/z-eval-configure` the command renders each cleanup_plan.groups summary with every files path and kind before asking Apply this cleanup plan with Apply, Skip cleanup, or Re-run /z-eval-configure with different choices.
Choosing Apply runs `pnpm run eval:cleanup-stale` with a plan that validates against templates/schema/cleanup-plan.schema.json.
After the write, generated rows in `.zoto/eval-system/manifest.yml` eval_files carry `_meta.primitive_analysis.invalidate: true` when static.framework changed against oldSnapshot.
cases.expected_output: A non-empty cleanup_plan is confirmed, stale framework assets are removed via pnpm eval:cleanup-stale, and manifest eval_file rows are marked for re-analysis.

primitive_analysis.summary: Command-owned askQuestion collects every Eval System config field in documented order, hands answers plus a manifest snapshot to zoto-eval-configurer for JSON-first LLM setup, then optionally confirms and runs pnpm eval:cleanup-stale when static.framework drift produces a non-empty cleanup plan.

follow_ups: Enable discovery for skill, command, agent, hook, cli, and lib.
Switch static.framework from vitest to pytest.
Use tsx runtime and composer-2.5 for llm.model.id.
assertions: After `/z-eval-configure`, choosing Skip cleanup updates `.zoto/eval-system/manifest.history.yml` noting deferred cleanup.
`pnpm run eval:cleanup-stale` does not execute on the Skip cleanup path.
cases.expected_output: Configuration is written but stale assets remain and manifest history records that cleanup was postponed.

primitive_analysis.summary: Command-owned askQuestion collects every Eval System config field in documented order, hands answers plus a manifest snapshot to zoto-eval-configurer for JSON-first LLM setup, then optionally confirms and runs pnpm eval:cleanup-stale when static.framework drift produces a non-empty cleanup plan.

follow_ups: Overwrite existing config with standard answers but forward preserveUserAuthoredCases false in the bundled payload.
Repair the payload so preserveUserAuthoredCases and writeMetaMarker are omitted or both true, then resume.
assertions: While either preserveUserAuthoredCases or writeMetaMarker is false in the outbound payload, zoto-eval-configurer refuses before any config write and on-screen text cites the contract breach.
After the corrected payload, the resumed run writes `.zoto/eval-system/config.yml` without prompting the operator to weaken those safeguards.
cases.expected_output: Configurer blocks the first hand-off, the command repairs the payload, and the resumed pass completes the write.

primitive_analysis.summary: Command-owned askQuestion collects every Eval System config field in documented order, hands answers plus a manifest snapshot to zoto-eval-configurer for JSON-first LLM setup, then optionally confirms and runs pnpm eval:cleanup-stale when static.framework drift produces a non-empty cleanup plan.

follow_ups: Keep skillsRoots and discoveryTargets unchanged from the prior snapshot.
Keep llm.runtime tsx and llm.model.id composer-2.5.
Change judgeModel from opus-4.6 to sonnet only.
Leave manualChecklists.enabled on with no additionalAutomation changes.
assertions: When cleanup_plan.totals.files equals zero, after `/z-eval-configure` the command skips the Apply this cleanup plan askQuestion entirely.
`.zoto/eval-system/config.yml` records the new judgeModel value.
cases.expected_output: Configurer writes the tweaked judgeModel and ends without a cleanup confirmation prompt because no removable files were planned.

primitive_analysis.summary: Command-owned askQuestion collects every Eval System config field in documented order, hands answers plus a manifest snapshot to zoto-eval-configurer for JSON-first LLM setup, then optionally confirms and runs pnpm eval:cleanup-stale when static.framework drift produces a non-empty cleanup plan.

follow_ups: Overwrite and proceed through answers until a non-empty cleanup_plan confirmation appears.
Cancel configuration changes on the restarted wizard.
assertions: Choosing Re-run /z-eval-configure with different choices discards the in-progress config write and restarts command-owned askQuestion from the existing-config disposition step.
After cancel on the restarted wizard, `.zoto/eval-system/config.yml` matches the pre-run backup content.

follow_ups: Overwrite with standard field answers until zoto-eval-configurer returns needs_user_input because cleanup_plan validation failed.

After `/z-eval-configure`, the command runs command-owned askQuestion for the resume answers and completes once the sanitised cleanup_plan validates.
cases.expected_output: The command surfaces schema rejection, collects resume answers, and finishes with a valid config and cleanup_plan.

primitive_analysis.summary: Command-owned askQuestion collects every Eval System config field in documented order, hands answers plus a manifest snapshot to zoto-eval-configurer for JSON-first LLM setup, then optionally confirms and runs pnpm eval:cleanup-stale when static.framework drift produces a non-empty cleanup plan.
